title: Marketing Executive & Student Recruitment
description:
Responsibilities

  • Actively promote the institution’s programs to prospective students and parents through on-site and online events, school visits, and information sessions.
  • Manage and nurture a pipeline of local leads via CRM systems, ensuring timely follow-ups to convert prospects into applications and enrolments.
  • Represent the institution at education fairs, open houses, and community outreach activities.
  • Conduct regular school visits and build strong relationships with school counsellors and other key stakeholders.
  • Support the admissions process in close coordination with academic and operations teams to ensure a smooth onboarding experience.
  • Plan and execute social media campaigns on platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
  • Produce engaging and brand-aligned content (videos, testimonials, live streams, reels) to boost awareness, engagement, and lead generation.
  • Track campaign performance through analytics and optimise strategies based on data insights.
  • Contribute to the creation of localized marketing campaigns tailored to Singapore’s student demographic.
  • Collaborate with the central marketing team to ensure consistent messaging and campaign objectives.
  • Provide insights and recommendations to improve the student journey and marketing touchpoints from awareness through enrolment.

Requirements

  • Preferable Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Business, Mass Communication, or a related discipline.
  • Proficient in digital marketing tools and social media platforms (especially Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts) is added advantage.
  • Content creation skills, including basic graphic design or video editing (Canva, CapCut, or similar tools), are an advantage is added advantage.
  • Knowledge of Singapore’s education landscape is added advantage.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd | EA License No: 20C0270

EA Personnel No: R22110981| EA Personnel Name: Law Mei Fong

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
postedCompany.name: WECRUIT PTE. LTD.
